// ─── UTILS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function waLink(contact, title, price) {
  const msg = encodeURIComponent(`Hi, I want to buy this account: ${title}, Price ₹${price}`);
  return `https://wa.me/${contact}?text=${msg}`;
}

function useFade(delay = 0) {
  const ref = useRef(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    const el = ref.current;
    if (!el) return;
    // Use opacity only — no transform so layout never shifts/jumps
    el.style.opacity = "0";
    el.style.transition = "none";
    const t = setTimeout(() => {
      el.style.transition = `opacity 0.55s ease ${delay}ms`;
      el.style.opacity = "1";
    }, 16); // one frame delay so initial style is applied
    return () => {
      clearTimeout(t);
      if (el) el.style.opacity = "1";
    };
  }, []); // run once on mount only
  return ref;
}

// ─── COMPONENTS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function Navbar({ page, setPage, adminLoggedIn, onAdminLogout }) {
  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <nav style={{ background: "rgba(5,5,15,0.85)", backdropFilter: "blur(16px)", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
      className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 flex items-center justify-between h-16">
        <button onClick={() => setPage("home")} className="flex items-center gap-2 group">
          <span style={{ color: "#a78bfa", fontSize: 22, fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif" }}>⬡</span>
          <span style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, letterSpacing: 2, color: "#e2e8f0" }}>
            GAME<span style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>VAULT</span>
          </span>
        </button>
        <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-6">
          <button onClick={() => setPage("home")} style={{ color: page === "home" ? "#a78bfa" : "#94a3b8", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, letterSpacing: 1, fontWeight: 600 }}
            className="hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">HOME</button>
          {adminLoggedIn ? (
            <>
              <button onClick={() => setPage("admin")} style={{ color: page === "admin" ? "#a78bfa" : "#94a3b8", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, letterSpacing: 1, fontWeight: 600 }}
                className="hover:text-purple-400 transition-colors">ADMIN PANEL</button>
              <button onClick={onAdminLogout} style={{ background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.15)", border: "1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4)", color: "#f87171", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "5px 14px", borderRadius: 6 }}
                className="hover:bg-red-500/25 transition-colors">LOGOUT</button>
            </>
          ) : (
            <button onClick={() => setPage("adminLogin")} style={{ background: "rgba(167,139,250,0.12)", border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.3)", color: "#a78bfa", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "5px 16px", borderRadius: 6 }}
              className="hover:bg-purple-500/20 transition-colors">ADMIN</button>
          )}
        </div>
        <button className="md:hidden text-slate-300" onClick={() => setMenuOpen(o => !o)}>
          {menuOpen ? "✕" : "☰"}
        </button>
      </div>
      {menuOpen && (
        <div style={{ background: "rgba(5,5,15,0.97)", borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }} className="md:hidden px-4 py-4 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <button onClick={() => { setPage("home"); setMenuOpen(false); }} style={{ color: "#94a3b8", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, textAlign: "left" }}>HOME</button>
          {adminLoggedIn ? (
            <>
              <button onClick={() => { setPage("admin"); setMenuOpen(false); }} style={{ color: "#94a3b8", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, textAlign: "left" }}>ADMIN PANEL</button>
              <button onClick={() => { onAdminLogout(); setMenuOpen(false); }} style={{ color: "#f87171", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, textAlign: "left" }}>LOGOUT</button>
            </>
          ) : (
            <button onClick={() => { setPage("adminLogin"); setMenuOpen(false); }} style={{ color: "#a78bfa", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 15, textAlign: "left" }}>ADMIN LOGIN</button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </nav>
  );
}

function HeroParticles() {
  const particles = Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => ({
    id: i,
    x: Math.random() * 100,
    y: Math.random() * 100,
    size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
    delay: Math.random() * 4,
    dur: Math.random() * 3 + 3,
    color: i % 3 === 0 ? "#a78bfa" : i % 3 === 1 ? "#f97316" : "#38bdf8",
  }));
  return (
    <div className="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none">
      {particles.map(p => (
        <div key={p.id} style={{
          position: "absolute", left: `${p.x}%`, top: `${p.y}%`,
          width: p.size, height: p.size, borderRadius: "50%",
          background: p.color, opacity: 0.5,
          animation: `float ${p.dur}s ease-in-out ${p.delay}s infinite alternate`,
          boxShadow: `0 0 ${p.size * 4}px ${p.color}`,
        }} />
      ))}
      <style>{`@keyframes float { from { transform: translateY(0px) scale(1); } to { transform: translateY(-20px) scale(1.2); } }`}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

function GameCard({ game, delay, onClick }) {
  const ref = useFade(delay);
  const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div ref={ref} onClick={onClick} onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(false)}
      style={{
        background: hovered ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)",
        border: `1px solid ${hovered ? game.accent + "80" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)"}`,
        borderRadius: 16, padding: "40px 32px", cursor: "pointer",
        transition: "all 0.35s ease",
        boxShadow: hovered ? `0 0 40px ${game.accent}30, 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` : "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
        transform: hovered ? "translateY(-6px) scale(1.01)" : "none",
        position: "relative", overflow: "hidden",
      }}>
      {/* bg glow */}
      <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: -60, right: -60, width: 200, height: 200, borderRadius: "50%", background: `radial-gradient(circle, ${game.accent}20 0%, transparent 70%)`, pointerEvents: "none" }} />

      <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 48, color: game.accent, marginBottom: 20, lineHeight: 1 }}>{game.icon}</div>
      <h3 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(1rem,2.5vw,1.4rem)", color: "#f1f5f9", marginBottom: 8, letterSpacing: 0.5 }}>{game.label}</h3>
      <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 14, marginBottom: 24, lineHeight: 1.5 }}>{game.tagline}</p>

      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
        <div style={{ background: `${game.accent}20`, border: `1px solid ${game.accent}40`, color: game.accent, fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "4px 14px", borderRadius: 100, fontWeight: 600 }}>
          {game.count} ACCOUNTS
        </div>
        <div style={{ color: game.accent, fontSize: 20, transition: "transform 0.3s", transform: hovered ? "translateX(6px)" : "none" }}>→</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── LISTINGS PAGE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function ListingsPage({ selectedGame, setPage, setSelectedAccount }) {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState(10000);
  const [minLevel, setMinLevel] = useState(0);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const titleRef = useFade(0);

  useEffect(() => { const t = setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 800); return () => clearTimeout(t); }, []);

  const filtered = MOCK_LISTINGS.filter(a =>
    a.game === selectedGame &&
    a.price <= maxPrice &&
    a.level >= minLevel &&
    (search === "" || a.title.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ||
      a.characters.some(c => c.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())))
  );

  const gameInfo = GAMES.find(g => g.id === selectedGame);

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#05050f", paddingTop: 80 }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{ padding: "48px 16px 32px", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", position: "relative", overflow: "hidden" }}>
        <div style={{ position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: `radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, ${gameInfo?.accent}15 0%, transparent 60%)`, pointerEvents: "none" }} />
        <div style={{ maxWidth: 1200, margin: "0 auto" }}>
          <button onClick={() => setPage("home")} style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 1, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, marginBottom: 24, background: "none", border: "none", cursor: "pointer" }}
            className="hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">
            ← BACK TO HOME
          </button>
          <div ref={titleRef} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 16, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            <span style={{ fontSize: 40 }}>{gameInfo?.icon}</span>
            <div>
              <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(1.4rem,4vw,2.4rem)", color: "#f1f5f9", marginBottom: 4 }}>{selectedGame}</h1>
              <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 14 }}>{filtered.length} accounts available</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{ maxWidth: 1200, margin: "0 auto", padding: "32px 16px", display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "280px 1fr", gap: 32, alignItems: "start" }}
        className="listings-grid">

        {/* FILTERS */}
        <div style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", borderRadius: 12, padding: 24, height: "fit-content", alignSelf: "start", position: "sticky", top: 88, maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 120px)", overflowY: "auto" }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 12, color: "#a78bfa", letterSpacing: 2, marginBottom: 24 }}>FILTERS</div>

          <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
            <label style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#94a3b8", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1, display: "block", marginBottom: 10 }}>SEARCH</label>
            <input value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Characters, title..."
              style={{ width: "100%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", borderRadius: 8, padding: "10px 14px", color: "#f1f5f9", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, outline: "none", boxSizing: "border-box" }} />
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
            <label style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#94a3b8", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1, display: "block", marginBottom: 10 }}>
              MAX PRICE: <span style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>₹{maxPrice.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </label>
            <input type="range" min={500} max={10000} step={100} value={maxPrice} onChange={e => setMaxPrice(+e.target.value)}
              style={{ width: "100%", accentColor: gameInfo?.accent }} />
            <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 11, marginTop: 4 }}>
              <span>₹500</span><span>₹10,000</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
            <label style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#94a3b8", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1, display: "block", marginBottom: 10 }}>
              MIN LEVEL: <span style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>{minLevel > 0 ? minLevel : "Any"}</span>
            </label>
            <input type="range" min={0} max={60} step={5} value={minLevel} onChange={e => setMinLevel(+e.target.value)}
              style={{ width: "100%", accentColor: gameInfo?.accent }} />
            <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 11, marginTop: 4 }}>
              <span>Any</span><span>60</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <button onClick={() => { setSearch(""); setMaxPrice(10000); setMinLevel(0); }}
            style={{ width: "100%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "#64748b", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "10px", borderRadius: 8, cursor: "pointer" }}
            className="hover:border-slate-500 hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">
            RESET FILTERS
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* ACCOUNT CARDS */}
        <div>
          {loading ? (
            <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))", gap: 20 }}>
              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
                <div key={i} style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)", borderRadius: 12, height: 340, animation: "shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite" }} />
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
            <div style={{ textAlign: "center", padding: "80px 16px" }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 48, marginBottom: 16 }}>🔍</div>
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 16 }}>No accounts found</div>
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#334155", fontSize: 14, marginTop: 8 }}>Try adjusting your filters</div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))", gap: 20 }}>
              {filtered.map((acc, i) => (
                <AccountCard key={acc.id} account={acc} delay={i * 80} gameInfo={gameInfo}
                  onClick={() => { setSelectedAccount(acc); setPage("details"); }} />
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes shimmer { 0%,100%{opacity:0.4}50%{opacity:0.8} }
        @media(max-width:768px){ .listings-grid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } .listings-grid > div:first-child { position: static !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; } }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

function AccountCard({ account, delay, gameInfo, onClick }) {
  const ref = useFade(delay);
  const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div ref={ref} onClick={onClick} onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(false)}
      style={{
        background: hovered ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)",
        border: `1px solid ${hovered ? (gameInfo?.accent + "60") : "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)"}`,
        borderRadius: 12, cursor: "pointer", overflow: "hidden",
        transition: "all 0.3s ease",
        transform: hovered ? "translateY(-4px)" : "none",
        boxShadow: hovered ? `0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 20px ${gameInfo?.accent}20` : "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
      }}>
      <div style={{ position: "relative", overflow: "hidden", height: 180 }}>
        <img src={account.images[0]} alt={account.title} style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover", transition: "transform 0.4s ease", transform: hovered ? "scale(1.05)" : "scale(1)" }} />
        <div style={{ position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "linear-gradient(to top, rgba(5,5,15,0.8) 0%, transparent 50%)" }} />
        <div style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: 10, left: 12, background: `${gameInfo?.accent}25`, border: `1px solid ${gameInfo?.accent}50`, color: gameInfo?.accent, fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 11, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: 100, fontWeight: 700 }}>
          LV {account.level}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{ padding: "16px 20px 20px" }}>
        <h3 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, color: "#e2e8f0", marginBottom: 8, lineHeight: 1.4 }}>{account.title}</h3>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 4, marginBottom: 14 }}>
          {account.characters.slice(0, 3).map(c => (
            <span key={c} style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", color: "#94a3b8", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 11, padding: "2px 8px", borderRadius: 4 }}>{c}</span>
          ))}
          {account.characters.length > 3 && (
            <span style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", color: "#475569", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 11, padding: "2px 8px", borderRadius: 4 }}>+{account.characters.length - 3}</span>
          )}
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 18, color: gameInfo?.accent, fontWeight: 700 }}>₹{account.price.toLocaleString()}</div>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1 }}>VIEW DETAILS →</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── ACCOUNT DETAILS PAGE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function DetailsPage({ account, setPage }) {
  const [imgIdx, setImgIdx] = useState(0);
  const titleRef = useFade(0);
  const gameInfo = GAMES.find(g => g.id === account.game);

  if (!account) return null;

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#05050f", paddingTop: 80 }}>
      <div style={{ maxWidth: 1100, margin: "0 auto", padding: "40px 16px" }}>
        <button onClick={() => setPage("listings")} style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 1, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, marginBottom: 32, background: "none", border: "none", cursor: "pointer" }}
          className="hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors">
          ← BACK TO LISTINGS
        </button>

        <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 48, alignItems: "start", minWidth: 0 }} className="details-grid">
          {/* LEFT - Images */}
          <div style={{ minWidth: 0 }}>
            <div style={{ borderRadius: 12, overflow: "hidden", marginBottom: 12, border: `1px solid ${gameInfo?.accent}30`, background: "#0a0a1a" }}>
              <img src={account.images[imgIdx]} alt={account.title} style={{ width: "100%", aspectRatio: "16/9", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
            </div>
            {account.images.length > 1 && (
              <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
                {account.images.map((img, i) => (
                  <button key={i} onClick={() => setImgIdx(i)}
                    style={{ flex: 1, borderRadius: 8, overflow: "hidden", border: `2px solid ${i === imgIdx ? gameInfo?.accent : "transparent"}`, cursor: "pointer", padding: 0, background: "none" }}>
                    <img src={img} alt="" style={{ width: "100%", height: 60, objectFit: "cover" }} />
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* RIGHT - Info */}
          <div ref={titleRef} style={{ minWidth: 0, overflowX: "hidden" }}>
            <div style={{ background: `${gameInfo?.accent}15`, border: `1px solid ${gameInfo?.accent}30`, color: gameInfo?.accent, fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, padding: "4px 14px", borderRadius: 100, display: "inline-block", marginBottom: 20, fontWeight: 600 }}>
              {account.game} • LV {account.level}
            </div>
            <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(1.2rem,3vw,1.8rem)", color: "#f1f5f9", marginBottom: 16, lineHeight: 1.3 }}>{account.title}</h1>
            <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 15, lineHeight: 1.8, marginBottom: 28 }}>{account.description}</p>

            <div style={{ marginBottom: 28 }}>
              <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, marginBottom: 12 }}>CHARACTERS</div>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 8 }}>
                {account.characters.map(c => (
                  <span key={c} style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "#cbd5e1", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, padding: "6px 14px", borderRadius: 6 }}>{c}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", borderRadius: 12, padding: "20px 24px", marginBottom: 28, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
              <div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, marginBottom: 4 }}>PRICE</div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.2rem)", color: gameInfo?.accent, fontWeight: 900 }}>₹{account.price.toLocaleString()}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{ textAlign: "right" }}>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, marginBottom: 4 }}>ORDER VIA</div>
                <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#25d366", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 700 }}>WhatsApp Only</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <a href={waLink(account.contact, account.title, account.price)} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"
              style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", gap: 12, background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #25d366, #128c7e)", color: "#fff", fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, letterSpacing: 2, padding: "18px 32px", borderRadius: 10, textDecoration: "none", boxShadow: "0 0 30px rgba(37,211,102,0.3)", transition: "all 0.3s ease" }}
              className="hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-green-400/40">
              <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z" /></svg>
              ORDER NOW ON WHATSAPP
            </a>

            <div style={{ marginTop: 16, textAlign: "center" }}>
              <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#334155", fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
                🔒 No payment here. You'll be redirected to WhatsApp to contact our admin directly.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <style>{`.details-grid > * { min-width: 0; } @media(max-width:768px){ .details-grid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } }`}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── ADMIN LOGIN ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function AdminLogin({ onLogin }) {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  const [pass, setPass] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const ref = useFade(0);

  const handleLogin = () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError("");
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (email === ADMIN_EMAIL && pass === ADMIN_PASS) { onLogin(); }
      else { setError("Invalid credentials. Try admin@gamevault.com / admin123"); }
      setLoading(false);
    }, 800);
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#05050f", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 16 }}>
      <div ref={ref} style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.025)", border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.2)", borderRadius: 16, padding: "48px 40px", width: "100%", maxWidth: 420, boxShadow: "0 0 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.15)" }}>
        <div style={{ textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 40 }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 32, color: "#a78bfa", marginBottom: 8 }}>⬡</div>
          <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 18, color: "#f1f5f9", marginBottom: 4 }}>ADMIN LOGIN</h1>
          <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 13 }}>GameVault Admin Panel</p>
        </div>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: 20 }}>
          <label style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1, display: "block", marginBottom: 8 }}>EMAIL</label>
          <input value={email} onChange={e => setEmail(e.target.value)} type="email" placeholder="admin@gamevault.com"
            style={{ width: "100%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", borderRadius: 8, padding: "12px 16px", color: "#f1f5f9", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, outline: "none", boxSizing: "border-box" }}
            onKeyDown={e => e.key === "Enter" && handleLogin()} />
        </div>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: 28 }}>
          <label style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1, display: "block", marginBottom: 8 }}>PASSWORD</label>
          <input value={pass} onChange={e => setPass(e.target.value)} type="password" placeholder="••••••••"
            style={{ width: "100%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", borderRadius: 8, padding: "12px 16px", color: "#f1f5f9", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, outline: "none", boxSizing: "border-box" }}
            onKeyDown={e => e.key === "Enter" && handleLogin()} />
        </div>
        {error && <div style={{ background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3)", borderRadius: 8, padding: "10px 14px", color: "#f87171", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, marginBottom: 20 }}>{error}</div>}
        <button onClick={handleLogin} disabled={loading}
          style={{ width: "100%", background: loading ? "rgba(124,58,237,0.4)" : "linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a78bfa)", color: "#fff", fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 13, letterSpacing: 2, padding: "14px", borderRadius: 8, border: "none", cursor: loading ? "not-allowed" : "pointer" }}>
          {loading ? "VERIFYING..." : "LOGIN →"}
        </button>
        <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#334155", fontSize: 12, textAlign: "center", marginTop: 20 }}>
          Demo: admin@gamevault.com / admin123
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── ADMIN PANEL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function AdminPanel({ setPage }) {
  const [listings, setListings] = useState(MOCK_LISTINGS);
  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState(null);
  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ game: "Genshin Impact", title: "", price: "", level: "", characters: "", description: "", images: "", contact: "917428025759" });
  const [toast, setToast] = useState("");
  const ref = useFade(0);

  const showToast = msg => { setToast(msg); setTimeout(() => setToast(""), 3000); };

  const handleSave = () => {
    if (!form.title || !form.price) return;
    const entry = {
      id: editingId || Date.now().toString(),
      game: form.game, title: form.title, price: +form.price, level: +form.level,
      characters: form.characters.split(",").map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
      description: form.description,
      images: form.images ? form.images.split(",").map(s => s.trim()) : ["https://placehold.co/800x500/1a0a2e/7c3aed?text=Account"],
      contact: form.contact, createdAt: new Date(),
    };
    if (editingId) {
      setListings(ls => ls.map(l => l.id === editingId ? entry : l));
      showToast("✓ Listing updated successfully");
    } else {
      setListings(ls => [entry, ...ls]);
      showToast("✓ New listing added successfully");
    }
    setShowForm(false); setEditingId(null);
    setForm({ game: "Genshin Impact", title: "", price: "", level: "", characters: "", description: "", images: "", contact: "917428025759" });
  };

  const handleEdit = (acc) => {
    setForm({ ...acc, characters: acc.characters.join(", "), images: acc.images.join(", "), price: acc.price.toString(), level: acc.level.toString() });
    setEditingId(acc.id); setShowForm(true);
  };

  const handleDelete = (id) => {
    if (window.confirm("Delete this listing?")) {
      setListings(ls => ls.filter(l => l.id !== id));
      showToast("✓ Listing deleted");
    }
  };

  const inputStyle = { width: "100%", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", borderRadius: 8, padding: "10px 14px", color: "#f1f5f9", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, outline: "none", boxSizing: "border-box" };
  const labelStyle = { fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 1, display: "block", marginBottom: 8 };

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#05050f", paddingTop: 80 }}>
      {/* Toast */}
      {toast && (
        <div style={{ position: "fixed", top: 80, right: 24, background: "rgba(34,197,94,0.15)", border: "1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.4)", color: "#4ade80", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, padding: "12px 20px", borderRadius: 8, zIndex: 100, boxShadow: "0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)" }}>
          {toast}
        </div>
      )}

      <div ref={ref} style={{ maxWidth: 1100, margin: "0 auto", padding: "40px 16px" }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: 40, flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 16 }}>
          <div>
            <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: "clamp(1.2rem,3vw,1.8rem)", color: "#f1f5f9", marginBottom: 4 }}>ADMIN PANEL</h1>
            <p style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 14 }}>{listings.length} total listings</p>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => { setShowForm(true); setEditingId(null); setForm({ game: "Genshin Impact", title: "", price: "", level: "", characters: "", description: "", images: "", contact: "917428025759" }); }}
            style={{ background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a78bfa)", color: "#fff", fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, padding: "12px 24px", borderRadius: 8, border: "none", cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 0 20px rgba(124,58,237,0.3)" }}>
            + ADD LISTING
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Form Modal */}
        {showForm && (
          <div style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.8)", backdropFilter: "blur(8px)", zIndex: 200, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 16 }}>
            <div style={{ background: "#0c0c1e", border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.2)", borderRadius: 16, padding: 32, width: "100%", maxWidth: 560, maxHeight: "90vh", overflowY: "auto" }}>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: 28 }}>
                <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 16, color: "#f1f5f9" }}>{editingId ? "EDIT LISTING" : "NEW LISTING"}</h2>
                <button onClick={() => setShowForm(false)} style={{ color: "#475569", background: "none", border: "none", fontSize: 20, cursor: "pointer" }}>✕</button>
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 16 }}>
                <div>
                  <label style={labelStyle}>GAME</label>
                  <select value={form.game} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, game: e.target.value }))} style={{ ...inputStyle }}>
                    <option>Genshin Impact</option>
                    <option>Wuthering Waves</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                {[
                  ["TITLE", "title", "text", "AR55 Raiden Account"],
                  ["PRICE (₹)", "price", "number", "4000"],
                  ["LEVEL", "level", "number", "55"],
                  ["CHARACTERS (comma separated)", "characters", "text", "Raiden, Hu Tao, Zhongli"],
                  ["DESCRIPTION", "description", "text", "Full account description..."],
                  ["IMAGE URLs (comma separated)", "images", "text", "https://..."],
                  ["WHATSAPP NUMBER", "contact", "text", "917428025759"],
                ].map(([label, key, type, ph]) => (
                  <div key={key}>
                    <label style={labelStyle}>{label}</label>
                    {key === "description" ? (
                      <textarea value={form[key]} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [key]: e.target.value }))} placeholder={ph} rows={3}
                        style={{ ...inputStyle, resize: "vertical" }} />
                    ) : (
                      <input value={form[key]} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [key]: e.target.value }))} type={type} placeholder={ph} style={inputStyle} />
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, marginTop: 24 }}>
                <button onClick={handleSave}
                  style={{ flex: 1, background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #a78bfa)", color: "#fff", fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, padding: "13px", borderRadius: 8, border: "none", cursor: "pointer" }}>
                  {editingId ? "UPDATE" : "CREATE"} LISTING
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => setShowForm(false)}
                  style={{ padding: "13px 20px", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "#64748b", borderRadius: 8, cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif" }}>
                  CANCEL
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Listings Table */}
        <div style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)", borderRadius: 12, overflow: "hidden" }}>
          <div style={{ overflowX: "auto" }}>
            <table style={{ width: "100%", borderCollapse: "collapse" }}>
              <thead>
                <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>
                  {["GAME", "TITLE", "PRICE", "LEVEL", "CHARACTERS", "ACTIONS"].map(h => (
                    <th key={h} style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#475569", fontSize: 11, letterSpacing: 2, padding: "14px 20px", textAlign: "left", fontWeight: 600 }}>{h}</th>
                  ))}
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {listings.map((acc, i) => (
                  <tr key={acc.id} style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", background: i % 2 === 0 ? "transparent" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.01)" }}>
                    <td style={{ padding: "14px 20px" }}>
                      <span style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: GAMES.find(g => g.id === acc.game)?.accent || "#a78bfa", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700 }}>{acc.game}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td style={{ padding: "14px 20px", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#cbd5e1", fontSize: 13 }}>{acc.title}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: "14px 20px", fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", color: "#a78bfa", fontSize: 13 }}>₹{acc.price.toLocaleString()}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: "14px 20px", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 13 }}>{acc.level}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: "14px 20px", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#64748b", fontSize: 12 }}>{acc.characters.slice(0, 2).join(", ")}{acc.characters.length > 2 ? "..." : ""}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: "14px 20px" }}>
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
                        <button onClick={() => handleEdit(acc)}
                          style={{ background: "rgba(167,139,250,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.3)", color: "#a78bfa", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 11, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "5px 12px", borderRadius: 6, cursor: "pointer" }}>
                          EDIT
                        </button>
                        <button onClick={() => handleDelete(acc.id)}
                          style={{ background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.1)", border: "1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3)", color: "#f87171", fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", fontSize: 11, letterSpacing: 1, padding: "5px 12px", borderRadius: 6, cursor: "pointer" }}>
                          DEL
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Firebase Note */}
        <div style={{ marginTop: 24, background: "rgba(251,191,36,0.06)", border: "1px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.2)", borderRadius: 10, padding: "16px 20px" }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#fbbf24", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 4 }}>🔥 Firebase Integration Note</div>
          <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#78716c", fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
            This admin panel uses local mock data. In production, replace MOCK_LISTINGS with Firestore calls:<br />
            <code style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>addDoc(collection(db, "listings"), data)</code> • <code style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>updateDoc(doc(db, "listings", id), data)</code> • <code style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>deleteDoc(doc(db, "listings", id))</code>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── FOOTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Footer({ setPage }) {
  return (
    <footer style={{ background: "rgba(5,5,15,0.9)", borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", padding: "40px 16px" }}>
      <div style={{ maxWidth: 1200, margin: "0 auto", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 20 }}>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
          <span style={{ color: "#a78bfa", fontSize: 20, fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif" }}>⬡</span>
          <span style={{ fontFamily: "'Orbitron',sans-serif", fontSize: 14, color: "#475569", letterSpacing: 2 }}>GAME<span style={{ color: "#a78bfa" }}>VAULT</span></span>
        </div>
        <div style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#334155", fontSize: 12, textAlign: "center" }}>
          © 2025 GameVault. Premium Account Catalog Platform.<br />
          <span style={{ color: "#1e293b" }}>Not affiliated with HoYoverse or Kuro Games.</span>
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 16 }}>
          <button onClick={() => window.open(`https://wa.me/917428025759`, "_blank")}
            style={{ fontFamily: "'Rajdhani',sans-serif", color: "#25d366", fontSize: 13, background: "none", border: "none", cursor: "pointer" }}>
            💬 WhatsApp
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

// ─── APP ROOT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function App() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState("home");
  const [selectedGame, setSelectedGame] = useState("Genshin Impact");
  const [selectedAccount, setSelectedAccount] = useState(null);
  const [adminLoggedIn, setAdminLoggedIn] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" }); }, [page]);

  const handleAdminPage = (p) => {
    if (p === "admin" && !adminLoggedIn) { setPage("adminLogin"); return; }
    setPage(p);
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ fontFamily: "sans-serif", background: "#05050f", minHeight: "100vh" }}>
      <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

      <Navbar page={page} setPage={handleAdminPage} adminLoggedIn={adminLoggedIn} onAdminLogout={() => { setAdminLoggedIn(false); setPage("home"); }} />

      {page === "home" && <HomePage setPage={setPage} setSelectedGame={setSelectedGame} />}
      {page === "listings" && <ListingsPage selectedGame={selectedGame} setPage={setPage} setSelectedAccount={setSelectedAccount} />}
      {page === "details" && selectedAccount && <DetailsPage account={selectedAccount} setPage={setPage} />}
      {page === "adminLogin" && <AdminLogin onLogin={() => { setAdminLoggedIn(true); setPage("admin"); }} />}
      {page === "admin" && adminLoggedIn && <AdminPanel setPage={setPage} />}

      {page !== "adminLogin" && page !== "admin" && <Footer setPage={setPage} />}
    </div>
  );
}
